data.title: VA Funds $1.5M MDMA Study To Treat PTSD In Veterans
data.description: The VA announces a $1.5 million study on MDMA-assisted therapy for veterans with PTSD and AUD, advancing psychedelic research.

data.title: Intel's New CEO Change Unlikely To Help Gain Traction Versus Taiwan Semi And Nvidia: Analysts
data.description: Intel Corp (NASDAQ: INTC) narrows search for new CEO, ex-board member Lip-Bu Tan a potential candidate. Struggling chipmaker's stock down 52% YTD.

data.title: Tesla Vs. BYD: The EV Duel Heats Up
data.description: Tesla dominates premium EV market, while BYD reshapes mid-tier and budget markets with affordability. Despite Tesla's bullish surge, BYD struggles.

data.title: Pepe Coin Gaining Traction Among Reddit Users, Leaving Dogecoin, Shiba Inu In The Dust: Technical Analysts See Bullish Momentum
data.description: Cryptocurrency analysts are forecasting a potential rally for meme coin Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE), fueled by plans from a Reddit community to pump the frog-themed crypto.
